zh.Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登
英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Maunsell於1113年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登時，他的父親John Mansel21歲，母親Elaine DeLutterell21歲。他於1135年與Cecily De Pagnell結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1167年之後，埋葬在印度جموں و کشمیر哈德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Maunsell于1113年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登时，他的父亲John Mansel21岁，母亲Elaine DeLutterell21岁。他于1135年与Cecily De Pagnell结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1167年之后，埋葬在印度جموں و کشمیر哈德。

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Maunsell was born in 1113, in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Mansel, was 21 and his mother, Elaine DeLutterell, was 21. He married Cecily De Pagnell in 1135. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died after 1167, and was buried in Had, Jammu and Kashmir, India.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Maunsell est né en 1113, à Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mansel, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elaine DeLutterell, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Cecily De Pagnell en 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé après 1167, et a été enterré à Had, Jammu and Kashmir, Inde.

Lui sposato Cecily De Pagnell nel 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì dopo il 1167, e fu sepolto a Had, Jammu and Kashmir, India.

ja.Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Engla: イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデン
イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Maunsellが1113年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデンで生まれた時，父John Manselは21歳，母Elaine DeLutterellは21歳であった。1135年にCecily De Pagnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1167年以後に死去し，インドجموں و کشمیرハドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Maunsell(이)가 1113년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 리틀 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mansel(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elaine DeLutterell(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1135년 Cecily De Pagnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1167년 이후 사망했으며 인도 جموں و کشمیر 하드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Cecily De Pagnell em 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1167, e foi sepultado em Had, Jammu and Kashmir, Índia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Maunsell родился в 1113 г. в местности литл миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Mansel было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elaine DeLutterell, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily De Pagnell в 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер после 1167 г. и был похоронен в местности хад, جموں و کشمیر, Индия.
